attributes.Pre SQL:
COLLECT STATISTICS ON $$STGDB.ST_IAM_COMPANY_THTR_DEPT_LINK;

UPDATE TGT FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.MT_IAM_COMPANY_THTR_DEPT_LINK TGT, $$STGDB.ST_IAM_COMPANY_THTR_DEPT_LINK SRC   
SET 
IAM_APPLICATION_KEY=SRC.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
,ASSIGNMENT_TYPE=SRC.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE
,STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG=SRC.STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG
,EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG=SRC.EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG
,APPLICATION_NAME=SRC.APPLICATION_NAME
,BK_CPR_UNIVERSAL_ID_INT=SRC.BK_CPR_UNIVERSAL_ID_INT
,INTERNAL_ROLE=SRC.INTERNAL_ROLE
,EXTERNAL_ROLE=SRC.EXTERNAL_ROLE
,CCO_ID=SRC.CCO_ID
,WORKER_TYPE_CD=SRC.WORKER_TYPE_CD
,CEC_ID=SRC.CEC_ID
,EXTERNAL_USER_EMAIL_ADDR=SRC.EXTERNAL_USER_EMAIL_ADDR
,EXTERNAL_FLG=SRC.EXTERNAL_FLG
,INTERNAL_FLG=SRC.INTERNAL_FLG
,IAM_DUMMY_USER_NAME=SRC.IAM_DUMMY_USER_NAME
,CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY=SRC.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY
,BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME=SRC.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
WHERE
TGT.IAM_USER_KEY=SRC.IAM_USER_KEY AND 
TGT.BK_COMPANY_CD=SRC.BK_COMPANY_CD AND 
TGT.BK_DEPARTMENT_CD=SRC.BK_DEPARTMENT_CD AND 
TGT.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT=SRC.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT;

UPDATE $$SECURITYVWDB.MT_IAM_COMPANY_THTR_DEPT_LINK EIURTH
SET 
 SOURCE_DELETED_FLG= 'Y'
 WHERE 
(EIURTH.IAM_USER_KEY, EIURTH.BK_COMPANY_CD, EIURTH.BK_DEPARTMENT_CD, EIURTH.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT ) 
NOT IN
(SELECT IAM_USER_KEY, BK_COMPANY_CD ,BK_DEPARTMENT_CD ,IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT  FROM $$STGDB.ST_IAM_COMPANY_THTR_DEPT_LINK);

insert into $$SECURITYVWDB.MT_IAM_COMPANY_THTR_DEPT_LINK SEL * FROM $$STGDB.ST_IAM_COMPANY_THTR_DEPT_LINK  EIURTH WHERE 
(EIURTH.IAM_USER_KEY, EIURTH.BK_COMPANY_CD, EIURTH.BK_DEPARTMENT_CD, EIURTH.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT ) 
NOT IN
(SELECT IAM_USER_KEY, BK_COMPANY_CD ,BK_DEPARTMENT_CD ,IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT  FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.MT_IAM_COMPANY_THTR_DEPT_LINK);


COLLECT STATISTICS ON $$SECURITYDB.MT_IAM_COMPANY_THTR_DEPT_LINK;

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	
NIU.IAM_USER_KEY,
'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE,
BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
ASSIGNMENT_TYPE ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
COALESCE(STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,'=') STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
COALESCE(EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,'=')  EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
'1' as  IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
APP.APPLICATION_NAME,
NIU.BK_CPR_UNIVERSAL_ID_INT,
COALESCE(NIU.INTERNAL_ROLE,'=') ,
COALESCE(NIU.EXTERNAL_ROLE,'=') ,
NIU.CCO_ID,
NIU.DD_BK_WORKER_TYPE_CD WORKER_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(NIU.DD_CEC_ID,'UNKNOWN')  CEC_ID,
NIU.RU_EXTERNAL_USER_EMAIL_ADDR EXTERNAL_USER_EMAIL_ADDR,
COALESCE(NIU.RU_EXTERNAL_FLG,'=') EXTERNAL_FLG,
COALESCE(NIU.RU_INTERNAL_FLG,'=') INTERNAL_FLG,
NIU.RU_IAM_DUMMY_USER_NAME IAM_DUMMY_USER_NAME,
NIU.RU_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,
IAM_ROLE_NAME AS BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
FROM	
(
SELECT	     
       IAMTHEA.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME IAM_ROLE_NAME,
	IAMTHEA.IAM_USER_KEY,
	IAMTHEA.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
	FINDEPT.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
	FINDEPT.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE ,
	IAMTHEA.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
	IAMTHEA.STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
	IAMTHEA.EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
	 IAMTHEA.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT 
FROM	
	$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_FINANCIAL_THEATRE_LINK  IAMTHEA,
	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV  FINCMPY,
	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT FINDEPT
WHERE	        IAMTHEA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'N' AND    
	IAMTHEA.BK_FINANCIAL_THEATRE_NAME_CD=FINCMPY.BK_FINANCIAL_THEATER_NAME_CODE     
AND	FINCMPY.BK_COMPANY_CODE=FINDEPT.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
AND	FINCMPY.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01' 
UNION	ALL	    
SELECT	
       IAMCMPY.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME IAM_ROLE_NAME,     
	IAMCMPY.IAM_USER_KEY,
	IAMCMPY.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
	FINDEPT.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
	FINDEPT.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE ,
	IAMCMPY.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
	IAMCMPY.STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
	IAMCMPY.EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
	 IAMCMPY.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT 
FROM	     
	$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_LINK  IAMCMPY,
	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT FINDEPT 
WHERE	  IAMCMPY.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'N' AND       
	FINDEPT.BK_COMPANY_CODE=IAMCMPY.BK_COMPANY_CD 
UNION	 ALL	    
SELECT	
       DEPT.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME IAM_ROLE_NAME,  
	DEPT.IAM_USER_KEY,
	DEPT.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
	MGTHIER.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE,
	MGTHIER.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
   	DEPT.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
	DEPT.STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
	DEPT.EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
	DEPT.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT 
FROM	     
	$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_MGMT_HIER_NODE_LINK DEPT,
	$$FINLGLVWDB.R_MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY  MGTHIER
WHERE	   DEPT.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'N' AND       
	(MGTHIER.node_level01_id_int=DEPT.DD_NODE_ID_INT
or MGTHIER.node_level02_id_int=DEPT.DD_NODE_ID_INT 
or MGTHIER.node_level03_id_int=DEPT.DD_NODE_ID_INT 
or MGTHIER.node_level04_id_int=DEPT.DD_NODE_ID_INT 
or MGTHIER.node_level05_id_int=DEPT.DD_NODE_ID_INT 
or MGTHIER.node_level06_id_int=DEPT.DD_NODE_ID_INT 
or MGTHIER.node_level07_id_int=DEPT.DD_NODE_ID_INT 
or MGTHIER.node_level08_id_int=DEPT.DD_NODE_ID_INT 
or MGTHIER.node_level09_id_int=DEPT.DD_NODE_ID_INT 
or MGTHIER.node_level10_id_int=DEPT.DD_NODE_ID_INT 
or MGTHIER.node_level11_id_int=DEPT.DD_NODE_ID_INT 
or MGTHIER.node_level12_id_int=DEPT.DD_NODE_ID_INT 
or MGTHIER.node_level13_id_int=DEPT.DD_NODE_ID_INT 
or MGTHIER.node_level14_id_int=DEPT.DD_NODE_ID_INT 
or MGTHIER.node_level15_id_int=DEPT.DD_NODE_ID_INT) 
UNION	ALL  
SELECT	
       DEPT.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME IAM_ROLE_NAME,  
	DEPT.IAM_USER_KEY,
	DEPT.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
	MGTHIER.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE,
	MGTHIER.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
   	DEPT.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
	DEPT.STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
	DEPT.EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
	DEPT.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT 
FROM	     
	$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_LINK  DEPT,
	$$FINLGLVWDB.R_PL_HIERARCHY  MGTHIER
WHERE	   DEPT.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'N'    AND       
	(MGTHIER.node_level01_id_int=DEPT.DD_NODE_ID_INT
or MGTHIER.node_level02_id_int=DEPT.DD_NODE_ID_INT 
or MGTHIER.node_level03_id_int=DEPT.DD_NODE_ID_INT 
or MGTHIER.node_level04_id_int=DEPT.DD_NODE_ID_INT 
or MGTHIER.node_level05_id_int=DEPT.DD_NODE_ID_INT 
or MGTHIER.node_level06_id_int=DEPT.DD_NODE_ID_INT 
or MGTHIER.node_level07_id_int=DEPT.DD_NODE_ID_INT 
or MGTHIER.node_level08_id_int=DEPT.DD_NODE_ID_INT 
or MGTHIER.node_level09_id_int=DEPT.DD_NODE_ID_INT 
or MGTHIER.node_level10_id_int=DEPT.DD_NODE_ID_INT 
or MGTHIER.node_level11_id_int=DEPT.DD_NODE_ID_INT 
or MGTHIER.node_level12_id_int=DEPT.DD_NODE_ID_INT 
or MGTHIER.node_level13_id_int=DEPT.DD_NODE_ID_INT 
or MGTHIER.node_level14_id_int=DEPT.DD_NODE_ID_INT 
or MGTHIER.node_level15_id_int=DEPT.DD_NODE_ID_INT))  IAMUSER,
	$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP,
	$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
WHERE	IAMUSER.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY = APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
AND	NIU.IAM_USER_KEY =  IAMUSER.IAM_USER_KEY
AND	NIU.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'N'  
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY NIU.IAM_USER_KEY,
BK_COMPANY_CODE ,
BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE, iam_role_name  ORDER BY 
	IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT   DESC) = 1
